Describe the sequence of actions performed by the feet regarding the writing instruments and paper throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the right foot grips a yellow pencil between the toes; at 4s, the left foot holds an orange pen cap while the right holds the pencil; at 8s, the pencil tip touches the paper and writing begins; at 16s, the notebook rests on a red clipboard as blue Urdu script becomes visible.

question: Outline the visual changes in the writing tools and the resulting text as the video progresses.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a yellow pencil with a purple eraser is gripped by the toes; at 6s, the pencil tip makes contact with the lined paper; at 12s, blue ink characters appear on the white surface; at 18s, specific Urdu script text is clearly visible alongside the yellow pen cap held by the left foot.
